module top_module(
  input source,
  output [n-1:0] power
);parameter n = 8; // number of bits of the generated power

reg [n-1:0] energy_store; // register to hold the generated power

always @ (posedge source) begin
  // conversion process from energy source to electrical power
  // replace this with your own implementation
  energy_store <= source * 2; // example implementation
end

assign power = energy_store; // output the generated power

endmodule
